consistency_checks: Verified unit price of the product is $12.50 on the product card.
Changed quantity in cart to 2 and confirmed item Subtotal updated to $25.00.
Compared Cart Total ($12.50) against expected total (sum of subtotals = $25.00).
Checked for any visible discounts or promotions (none shown).
Confirmed only a single line item is in the cart.

bug_report.expected_behavior: The Cart Total should equal the sum of item subtotals and display $25.00 when the quantity is 2 at $12.50 each.
bug_report.observed_behavior: With quantity set to 2, the item shows Subtotal $25.00 but the Cart Total remains $12.50.
reproduction_steps: Open the Demo Shop home page.
Click 'Add to cart' on Blue Shockproof Phone Case.
Observe that the item Subtotal updates to $25.00 but the Cart Total stays at $12.50.
bug_report.title: Cart Total shows unit price instead of subtotal when quantity > 1

consistency_checks: Verified unit price of the product is $12.50 on the product card.
Changed quantity in cart to 2 and confirmed item Subtotal updated to $25.00.
Compared Cart Total ($12.50) against expected total (sum of subtotals = $25.00).
Checked for any visible discounts or promotions (none shown).
Confirmed only a single line item is in the cart.
decision.observation_summary: Cart shows Blue Shockproof Phone Case with Unit $12.50 and Subtotal $25.00 for quantity 2, but the Cart Total displays $12.50.
decision.reason: The cart total does not reflect the updated quantity/subtotal.
decision.reasoning: After adding the item and setting quantity to 2, the item subtotal correctly shows $25.00 (12.50 x 2). However, the cart Total remains $12.50, which matches the unit price, not the sum of item subtotals. No discounts are shown that would explain the difference, and only one item is in the cart. This indicates the cart total is not recalculating with quantity changes.
